case_title: CAYETANO A. DESALES VS. DEMETRIO T. VALENCIA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESALES, CAYETANO A. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
